hook.summary: A character is annoyed by a slamming door, and the player must find a way to stop it.
hook.visual_action: A finger drags a green ottoman in front of a slamming door to block it.
hook.text_overlay: The door keeps slamming. Stop it!

scene_flow: A character is shown annoyed by a slamming door with a prompt to stop it.
A hand drags a green ottoman to block the door, solving the puzzle.
A new level appears where the player must fix a washing machine by plugging it in.
The washing machine starts working, and a green checkmark appears.
Final end card displays the game title 'BRAIN TEST 4' and various level previews with a 'PLAY NOW' button.
on_screen_text: The door keeps slamming. Stop it!
The washing machine is not working!
Dr Worry needs to get blood samples from that fly.
I must please that cute cat.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle game players who enjoy brain teasers and logic-based problem solving.
